steps.title: Read the given slope
steps.content:
The equation is already in slope-intercept form.
$$
y=-\frac{1}{3}x+15
$$
So the slope of line $t$ is 
$$
-\frac{1}{3}
$$

steps.title: Use perpendicular slopes
steps.content: Perpendicular slopes are negative reciprocals. $$ -\frac{1}{-1/3}=3 $$ The answer is B.
